case_title: SHARON KINCAID ROLLINS VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: AFTER HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR. (212) PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: PATRICIA M EVEZICH. (212)
NOTICE TO PLTF OF REMOVAL TO FEDERAL COURT BY DEFT CCSF

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-17-2003 CONTINUED TO JAN-20-2004 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOV-17-2003 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST CRAIG K. MARTIN, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JAN-20-2004, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-04-2004. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: JANET POND. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
